dateline: Johnson Space Center, Houston / Kennedy Space Center — 2017–Present
heroHeadline: Artemis II Crew Holds Postflight Briefing; Mobile Launcher 1 Rolls to VAB for Artemis III
heroSubtitle: Apr 16: Crew held official postflight news conference at JSC while NASA's Mobile Launcher 1 began its 4-mile journey back to the VAB to begin Artemis III stacking preparations, targeting a 2027 launch.
footerNote: Data sourced from NASA.gov, OIG Reports, SpaceNews, Ars Technica, Congressional appropriations. Tier 1: NASA/ESA/Official. Tier 2: SpaceNews/Ars Technica/Reuters. Tier 3: Planetary Society/AIAA.
